brand.oneLiner: Proof of Launch is the AI-native product studio for healthtech, fintech, and retail. The proof is in the launch.

hero.eyebrow: AI-Native Product Studio · Healthtech · Fintech · Retail
hero.subhead: Proof of Launch is an AI-native product studio for **healthtech, fintech, and retail** — industries where launching wrong becomes a compliance event, not just a bad review. We build fast with AI. We prove every launch on real devices. **We ship our own apps this way first.**

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: Short call with James. Where are you — raw idea, app in progress, or ready to ship? We route you to the right track.

steps.title: Studio — if you need it built
steps.description: AI-accelerated build with engineering where it matters. Healthtech, fintech, or retail — we've shipped in each.

steps.title: LaunchOps — always
steps.description: Every build ends in our QA discipline. Real device lab. App store readiness. Compliance review for regulated launches.

steps.title: Proven live
steps.description: You ship with a written go/no-go report, not a hope. Ongoing retainer available for teams shipping weekly.
steps.tag: The proof is in the launch

items: The Proof Is In The Launch

tracksSection.headline:
One Studio.
Two Tracks.
tracksSection.subhead: We built our own apps across healthtech, retail, and finance — used daily in production. Now we productize the same discipline for clients. Come to us with a raw idea, or an app that's already built. Either way, you leave with something proven.

tracks.name: LaunchOps
tracks.tagline: You already built something. We test it, harden it, deploy it, and prove it's ready to ship — on real hardware, in real conditions. Built specifically for AI-generated apps in regulated industries.
features: Functional QA — 30 to 80+ test cases per tier
Real device lab — iOS & Android, not simulators
Cloud migration off Replit to AWS, GCP, Azure
Rejection Recovery for rejected App Store submissions

tracks.name: Studio
tracks.tagline: You need an app built. We validate, scope, and build — AI-accelerated for speed, engineer-owned for reliability. Every Studio build ships through LaunchOps QA. Priced flat. Scoped tight.
features: Discovery call with James — free, no deck
AI tools where they accelerate — Replit, Lovable, Cursor, Bolt, v0
Engineers write infrastructure and critical logic from scratch
LaunchOps QA bundled in every tier

portfolio.headline:
We Ship This Stuff
Ourselves.
portfolio.subhead: Most studios claim vertical experience from the last three client logos they added to their site. We operate businesses in healthtech, retail, and finance — with apps built by our own team, running in production today. This is where our discipline comes from.

cards.name: Clinical Field App
cards.description: AI-built patient intake and clinical workflow tool used daily by field staff. HIPAA-aware permissions, real-device tested, offline-capable.
bullets: HIPAA permission flows verified on real hardware
Offline-first — syncs PHI without data loss

cards.name: Operations & Inventory
cards.description: Field operations and inventory management tool used across multiple store locations. Budget-Android hardware, spotty Wi-Fi, high daily transaction volume.
bullets: Offline sync tested against real-world network drops
Runs on budget Android hardware by design
Barcode scanning verified on actual store devices
Supports daily operations without engineering handholding

cards.name: Compliance Workflow
cards.description: Customer onboarding and compliance-gated workflow with audit trails. KYC flows, edge-case validation, and regulatory gating built AI-accelerated but engineer-owned.
bullets: KYC flows tested against edge-case identifiers
Regulatory gating on every transition point
Built to survive a real compliance review, not just look clean

closer.title: Why this matters for you.
closer.text: We don't learn compliance flows on your project. We don't discover offline sync breakage on your clients. The failure modes that show up in healthtech, fintech, and retail apps — we've already hit them, fixed them, and turned the fixes into SOPs. That's what you get when you hire Proof of Launch.

studioSection.headline:
From Idea to App
in Three Phases.
studioSection.subhead: Every Studio build starts with a short discovery call — no code, no cost, just a sharp conversation about what you're building, which regulated vertical you're in, and whether it has legs. We've shipped apps in healthtech, retail, and fintech ourselves. We know where AI-generated code breaks in each.

phases.name: Discovery & Business Development
phases.description: James leads a structured discovery session to validate your idea, identify the market opportunity, define your MVP scope, choose the right tech stack, and produce a build estimate. This is where most studios charge $2,000+. We include it free — because a bad build scope wastes everyone's time.
phases.includes: ✓ Free · Included with every build engagement

phases.name: Build
phases.description: We use the right tool for each layer. Vibe coding tools like Lovable, v0, and Bolt accelerate UI and scaffolding. Cursor and Replit handle logic and integrations. Our engineers write infrastructure, deployment pipelines, and backend architecture from scratch — because some things shouldn't be AI-generated. Weekly progress demos throughout.

phases.name: Prove & Launch
phases.description: Every build includes a Proof of Launch QA and deploy cycle. Functional testing, real device lab, cloud infrastructure setup, app store submission if applicable. You don't just get code — you get a production-ready product with a written go/no-go report.
phases.includes: ✓ QA tier bundled · Cloud deploy included

tiers.name: Starter Build
tiers.subtitle: Web app, internal tool, or landing page — AI-accelerated
features: Web app or internal tool build
Deployment to Vercel, Netlify, or Railway

tiers.name: Growth Build
tiers.subtitle: Full web or mobile app — hybrid AI + engineering
features: Full web or mobile app build

tiers.name: Venture Build
tiers.subtitle: Complex platform — engineers from scratch, AI-assisted where it accelerates
features: AI-accelerated where it adds speed — engineer-owned throughout

philosophy.headline: AI-accelerated. Human in the loop. Always.
philosophy.text: We use vibe coding and AI tools where they genuinely accelerate — UI scaffolding, rapid prototyping, iteration. A human engineer reviews, hardens, and signs off on every line that ships. Every build is AI-accelerated and human-owned. No output reaches production without review.

launchOpsSection.headline:
Already Built?
Let's Prove It.
launchOpsSection.subhead: Bring us your existing app — vibe coded, agency built, or homegrown. We test it on real hardware, harden it, and deploy it to production infrastructure. Built specifically for AI-generated apps in regulated industries.

tiers.name: Finish Line
features: One feature completion or bug fix sprint
Ideal for stalled Replit or Lovable builds

tiers.name: Retainer
tiers.priceAnchor: vs. $6K–$8K/mo for a junior US QA hire · vs. $2,500/mo for AI-only tools

addOns.name: Rejection Recovery
addOns.description: Got rejected by App Store or Google Play? Fast audit against the specific guideline cited, fix recommendations, resubmission readiness. Apple rejects ~25% of submissions — and the 2026 rules are tighter.

addOns.name: Real Device Audit
addOns.description: Device-specific crashes post-launch? 3-device physical audit with bug report. Tests the failures simulators never catch.

fullCycle.name: Full Cycle
fullCycle.description: Complex platforms, regulated industries, funded startups. Phased QA, recruited UAT users, load testing, security audits, full cloud architecture. Scoped on discovery call.

devicesSection.headline:
What Simulators
Won't Catch.
devicesSection.subhead: Touch target failures. Camera permission bugs after restart. Offline sync breaking on iOS PWA. Screens washed out in sunlight. These only appear on real hardware — and they're exactly the failures that become clinical incidents, compliance events, or lost retail sales. Our device lab tests every LaunchOps engagement on actual phones and tablets.

failureModes.title: Camera permissions after app restart
failureModes.description: Permission state changes between sessions — simulators never replicate this.

failureModes.title: Outdoor sunlight readability
failureModes.description: Clinical and field apps must be readable in direct sunlight. We test there.

failureModes.title: Offline sync and reconnect cycles
failureModes.description: Data entered offline → airplane mode off → sync verified in database.

failureModes.title: WebRTC video device-to-device
failureModes.description: Video call quality on actual mobile hardware — not a desktop Chrome tab.

devicesSection.fleetLabel: Our Device Fleet — Real Hardware, Real Conditions

contactSection.headline:
Have an Idea
or an App?
contactSection.subhead: Tell us where you are — raw idea, app in progress, or ready to ship — and we'll come back within one business day with a clear next step. Discovery is always free.

facts.text: **Discovery is free.** Short call, no deck, no commitment.
**24-hour response** on all new project inquiries.
**Healthtech, fintech, retail.** We've shipped in each.
Global team · **ops hub in Manila**. That's how we deliver 24-hour Tier 1 turnaround.
All projects covered by **NDA and IP agreement** from day one.
**Flat-rate pricing** — no hidden fees, no hourly surprises.

Shipping weekly — need ongoing QA (LaunchOps Retainer)
